headline: Release-candidate QA pass smooths the smallest mobile breakpoints, multilingual button density, and cross-loop re-entry rhythm across result and My Trips.
notes: Result first-fold actions now rebalance into a cleaner two-column layout before collapsing fully, so save/share/My Trips actions stay readable on narrow phones.
Jump chips and sticky result controls were tightened for small screens, with better snap behavior and safer multilingual spacing.
My Trips now stacks its opening hero actions more cleanly and gives the search row a narrower-phone layout that avoids cramped select/button combinations.
This pass is aimed at release-candidate QA: fewer crowded controls, steadier first-fold scanning, and cleaner loop re-entry across mobile widths.
